name: Blueberry Muffins with Nutmeg Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon freshly grated nutmeg stirred into 1/4 cup granulated sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter with both sugars until very light in color. Scrape sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula.
2. Add vanilla, eggs, and buttermilk, beating constantly.
3. In another bowl, stir together nutmeg, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and flours.
4. Add to butter mixture. Gently mix just until combined.
5. Gently fold in blueberries. Fill paper-lined muffin cups to the top with batter.
6. Sprinkle each muffin with about 2 teaspoons of nutmeg sugar.
7. Bake on a rack in the upper 1/3 of a 400-degree oven until muffins are lightly browned, about 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Remove muffins from pan to a cooling rack. Serve warm or at room temperature. Makes 16 muffins or 6 jumbo muffins.
Each small muffin contains about: 159 calories, 153 mg sodium, 43 mg cholesterol, 7 grams of fat, 23 grams carbohydrates, 2 grams protein, and 0.28 gram fiber.
